creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
Created attachment 231677
update to the patch

This update addresses many of the tips and comments made, however, it still fails on checking pkg-plist issues:

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%WWWDIR%%/%%USER%%-styling/.eslintrc.js
Error: Orphaned: %%WWWDIR%%/%%USER%%-styling/yarn.lock
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%DBDIR%%/storage/certs
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%DBDIR%%/storage
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: etc/rc.d/%%USER%%
Error: Missing: @dir %%DBDIR%%/certs
===> Error: Plist issues found.

i think i can get rid of the first two Orphaned errors, by removing said files, since they are not useful for production

but i don't really understand the other errors.

why is `etc/rc.d/%%USER%%` missing?
`etc/rc.d/gotosocial` exists?

why is ` @dir %%DBDIR%%/certs` missing?
`@dir(%%USER%%,%%GROUP%%,) %%DBDIR%%/certs` exists.
